basics.label: AI Systems Engineer | Applied Machine Learning & Distributed Systems

work.summary: Architecting Generative AI features in global CRM to enhance digital economic vitality across millions of enterprises.

highlights: Optimized analytics for enterprise-scale mobile systems.

work.summary: Integrated Llama 3 into Messenger at scale for US-led AI deployment.
highlights: Designed storage schemas with SQLite and used LangChain for model integration and tuning.
